Lakecia Gunter — AI Strategy

Stop buying AI tools. Start building AI leverage.

The companies winning with AI aren't the ones with the most tools. They're the ones with the clearest strategy. I help leadership teams find theirs — fast.

Book a call → Read the manifesto

What I believe

Most AI spending is wasted. Not because the tools are bad. Because the strategy is missing. You can't buy your way to AI maturity.
Your competitors aren't ahead. They're just louder. The race is still open. But the window is closing.
Strategy beats technology. Every time. The right plan with basic tools outperforms the wrong plan with cutting-edge ones.
Speed matters. Not reckless speed. But 90-day sprints that produce real outcomes, not 18-month engagements that produce decks.

I've been where you are.

CTO at Microsoft. CTO at Intel. I've built AI products, led global teams, and sat in the boardrooms where these decisions get made.

Now I work with companies who are serious about AI but tired of the hype. No frameworks. No buzzwords. Just clear thinking and executable plans.

100+
Board presentations delivered

How we work

AI Strategy Sprint

Two weeks. Assessment, prioritization, roadmap. You get clarity and a plan.

$25,000

Executive Coaching

Monthly 1:1s. For leaders who need to understand AI well enough to decide.

$5,000/mo

Board Advisory

Ongoing guidance for leadership teams making AI investment decisions.

$10,000/mo

The window is open.

Not for long. Let's talk about where AI fits in your business.
